features: 48H ODOUR PROTECTION - Lynx Jungle Fresh Antiperspirant Stick provides up to 48 hours of sweat and odour protection. Fights body odour and wetness during work, workouts, or daily activities. Stay dry, fresh, and confident all day with Lynx’s trusted formula.

JUNGLE FRESH FRAGRANCE - Lynx Jungle Fresh combines crisp green notes, vibrant citrus, and subtle woody tones for an invigorating, masculine scent. Keeps you smelling clean, fresh, and confident all day with a fragrance that lasts and evolves with your mood.

NON-STICKY APPLICATION - Lynx stick glides on smoothly without white marks or sticky residue. Dermatologically tested, it keeps skin comfortable while providing effective odour control and moisture protection. Easy-to-use for consistent freshness and irritation-free comfort daily.

LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS - Lynx Jungle Fresh Antiperspirant fights sweat and odour at the source, keeping you dry and confident for up to 48 hours. Perfect for busy days, workouts, or everyday use, it ensures reliable, all-day freshness and comfort.

VALUE 3-PACK - Get more of your favourite fragrance with this practical 3-pack of Lynx Jungle Fresh Antiperspirant Sticks. Each 50ml stick delivers long-lasting performance and unbeatable freshness. Keep one at home, one in your gym bag, and one at work so you’re always prepared.
description: Product description Lynx Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Stick 48H Odour Protection Jungle Fresh 50ml, 3 Pack Up for a wild adventure? Experience LYNX Jungle Fresh Antiperspirant Deodorant Stick with the revitalising scent of palm leaves and amber as fresh as Nature herself. This antiperspirant deodorant for men offers 48 hours of odour protection with our revolutionary dual-action pro-scent technology, keeping you smelling awesome and feeling chill, all day. Better still, the 48-hour anti-sweat formula gives you long-lasting protection against wetness and keeps your underarms Superdry. You never know what's around the corner. Or who. With our antiperspirant deodorant stick, you can rest easy knowing you're 100% ready no matter what comes your way. Be answerable. Be unstoppable. Features: Jungle Fresh Antiperspirant Deodorant Stick with the revitalising scent of palm leaves and amber as fresh as Nature herself. This antiperspirant deodorant for men offers 48 hours of odour protection with our revolutionary dual-action pro-scent technology. The 48-hour anti-sweat formula gives you long-lasting protection against wetness and keeps your underarms Superdry. This great-smelling LYNX deodorant stick comes in recyclable packaging Loving this Deodorant Stick? Try other LYNX deodorant products, including LYNX Epic Fresh Body Spray How to Use: Turn the dial to raise the product and apply a thin layer to your underarms to make the most of the 48 hours of irresistible freshness. Ingredients: Aluminium Zirconium Tetrachlorohydrex GLY, Isopropyl Palmitate, Stearyl Alcohol, Cyclopentasiloxane, PPG-14 Butyl Ether, Paraffinum Liquidum, Talc, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Parfum, Steareth-100, BHT, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Coumarin, Limonene, Linalool. Safety Warnings: Do not use on broken skin. Stop use if rash or irritation occurs. Box Contains: 3x Lynx Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Stick Jungle Fresh, 50ml Directions Turn the dial to raise the product and apply a thin layer to your underarms to make the most of the 48 hours of irresistible freshness.
